description_long: This object is a modern smartphone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners, featuring a large, edge-to-edge glass touchscreen on the front. The front display shows a digital clock, date, and lock screen icons, with a small notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back is made of smooth, reflective material, likely glass, and includes a vertically-aligned dual camera module with a flash in the top left corner, as well as a centered, metallic brand logo. The sides are thin and metallic, with subtle seams indicating the presence of buttons and antenna bands. The overall design is minimalist and premium, with a silver-gray color scheme and high-gloss finish. This device is typical of high-end smartphones commonly seen in urban environments.
description: A sleek, modern smartphone with a large glass touchscreen, dual rear cameras, and a reflective silver-gray back with a centered logo. The design is minimalist and premium, with metallic sides and a high-gloss finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, edge-to-edge glass display with a notch at the top and visible lock screen interface.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the ultra-thin metallic edge and the slight camera bump on the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the reflective glass back, centered logo, and vertically-aligned dual camera module in the top left corner.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, emphasizing the slimness and seamless metallic edge without visible buttons.
attribute_brand_logo: A metallic logo is centered on the back, resembling a stylized apple shape, silver in color and reflective.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a lock screen with the time '9:41', the date 'Tuesday, September 12', a lock icon, and two small icons at the bottom for flashlight and camera. The background is a soft, abstract gradient of blue, orange, and white.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two camera lenses and a flash arranged vertically in a pill-shaped module at the top left corner on the back of the device.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are subtly visible on the sides: a power button on the right edge and volume buttons on the left edge, all elongated and flush with the metallic frame.
